messages.content:
[Previous conversation summary]

<analysis>
Looking at the conversation chronologically:

1. **Initial Error Fix**: User reported XAML duplicate property error (HorizontalScrollBarVisibility was set twice). Fixed by removing duplicate.

2. **UI Cleanup Requests**: 
   - Remove header "Проводник" with icon
   - Remove "0 файлов" counter at bottom
   - Make Downloads color white
   - Change "Все"/"Загрузки" to "All"/"Downloads"
   - Make file/folder text white in TreeView

3. **TreeView Binding Errors**: User asked if these errors affect functionality. They don't - just warnings in Output window. Fixed by adding global TreeViewItem style.

4. **Resize Feature Request**: User wanted:
   - External window resize via 8px edge areas with cursor changes
   - Internal resize via GridSplitter between browser and tracks
   - Min column width 100px

5. **UI Broken**: After adding resize code, UI broke badly. Had to rollback to working version.

6. **New Resize Request**: User approved adding resize carefully - 8px areas on all edges, vertical draggable line between browser and tracks.

**Current state**: Implementing resize with template-based approach for outer resize areas + GridSplitter for inner resize.
</analysis>

# Conversation Summary

## 1. Primary Request and Intent

User is developing **"halo Blik" (AudioStudio)** - a WPF audio editor at `E:\Atest1.0\AudioStudio\AudioStudio\`.

**Critical Rule**: Never modify `publish` folder directly. Only modify source code and use Debug builds for testing.

**Current Requests:**
- Add **external window resize** with 8px transparent areas on all edges (corners + sides)
- Change cursor on hover (↔, ↕, diagonal arrows)
- Add **internal GridSplitter** between browser panel and tracks area
- Minimum column widths: 150px for browser, 200px for tracks
- All text in TreeView should be white

## 2. Key Technical Concepts

- **WPF (Windows Presentation Foundation)** with custom frameless window
- `WindowStyle="None"` + `AllowsTransparency="True"`
- Custom Window Template with transparent Rectangle elements for resize
- `Window.ResizeMode="CanResize"` for native resizing behavior
- `GridSplitter` for internal panel resizing
- `TreeView` with hierarchical data binding for file browser
- NAudio library for audio file handling
- C# event handlers for mouse-based resize functionality

## 3. Files and Code Sections

### MainWindow.xaml
**File**: `E:\Atest1.0\AudioStudio\AudioStudio\MainWindow.xaml`

**Key changes made:**

1. **Window Style with Resize Template** (added at top):
```xml

            <Setter.Value>
                <ControlTemplate TargetType="Window">

                        <!-- Ресайз области -->
                        <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                            <RowDefinition Height="8"/>
                            <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                            <RowDefinition Height="8"/>
                        </Grid.RowDefinitions>
                        <

Please continue from where we left off.

content.text: I understand the previous context. Continuing with the task.

messages.content:
**Готово!** Сборка успешна. ✅

**Добавлено:**

🔲 **Внешний ресайз (8px по краям):**
- 8 полупрозрачных областей по углам и сторонам
- Курсор меняется на ↔, ↕ или диагональные стрелки
- Ресайз работает с сохранением противоположного края

📐 **Внутренний разделитель:**
- Вертикальная линия между браузером и треками
- Потяни чтобы изменить ширину браузера
- Минимальная ширина: 150px для браузера, 200px для треков

**Тестируй!** 🎯
только давай без полос просто невидимая область для ресайза (необязательно увеличивать чтоб работало)

{"success":true,"file_path":"E:\Atest1.0\AudioStudio\AudioStudio\MainWindow.xaml","content":"<Window x:Class="AudioStudio.MainWindow"
        xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
        xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
        xmlns:local="clr-namespace:AudioStudio"
        Title="halo Blik - Audio Studio" 
        Height="800" Width="1400"
        MinHeight="600" MinWidth="1100"
        WindowStartupLocation="CenterScreen"
        WindowStyle="None"
        AllowsTransparency="True"
        Background="#FF2D2D30">

    <Window.Resources>
        <Style x:Key="MenuButton" TargetType="Button">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="Transparent"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FFAAAAAA"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="0"/>
            <Setter Property="Padding" Value="12,6"/>
            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="12"/>
            <Setter Property="Cursor" Value="Hand"/>
            <Setter Property="Template">
                <Setter.Value>
                    <ControlTemplate TargetType="Button">
                        <Border x:Name="border" Background="{TemplateBinding Background}" 
                                CornerRadius="3" Padding="{TemplateBinding Padding}">
                            <ContentPresenter HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                        </Border>
                        <ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                            <Trigger Property="IsMouseOver" Value="True">
                                <Setter TargetName="border" Property="Background" Value="#FF3E3E42"/>
                                <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="White"/>
                            </Trigger>
                        </ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                    </ControlTemplate>
                </Setter.Value>
            </Setter>
        </Style>

        <Style x:Key="TransportButton" TargetType="Button">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#FF3E3E42"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="White"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="0"/>
            <Setter Property="Width" Value="40"/>
            <Setter Property="Height" Value="32"/>
            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="14"/>
            <Setter Property="Cursor" Value="Hand"/>
            <Setter Property="Template">
                <Setter.Value>
                    <ControlTemplate TargetType="Button">
                        <Border x:Name="border" Background="{TemplateBinding Background}" 
                                CornerRadius="4" Padding="{TemplateBinding Padding}">
                            <ContentPresenter HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                        </Border>
                        <ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                            <Trigger Property="IsMouseOver" Value="True">
                                <Setter TargetName="border" Property="Background" Value="#FF505054"/>
                            </Trigger>
                            <Trigger Property="IsEnabled" Value="False">
                                <Setter Property="Opacity" Value="0.5"/>
                            </Trigger>
                        </ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                    </ControlTemplate>
                </Setter.Value>
            </Setter>
        </Style>

        <Style x:Key="PlayButton" TargetType="Button" BasedOn="{StaticResource TransportButton}">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#FF4CAF50"/>
            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="16"/>
        </Style>

        <Style x:Key="StopButton" TargetType="Button" BasedOn="{StaticResource TransportButton}">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#FFF44336"/>
        </Style>

        <Style x:Key="ToolButton" TargetType="Button">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#FF3E3E42"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FFAAAAAA"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="0"/>
            <Setter Property="Width" Value="32"/>
            <Setter Property="Height" Value="28"/>
            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="12"/>
            <Setter Property="Cursor" Value="Hand"/>
            <Setter Property="Template">
                <Setter.Value>
                    <ControlTemplate TargetType="Button">
                        <Border x:Name="border" Background="{TemplateBinding Background}" 
                                CornerRadius="3">
                            <ContentPresenter HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                        </Border>
                        <ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                            <Trigger Property="IsMouseOver" Value="True">
                                <Setter TargetName="border" Property="Background" Value="#FF505054"/>
                                <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="White"/>
                            </Trigger>
                            <Trigger Property="IsPressed" Value="True">
                                <Setter TargetName="border" Property="Background" Value="#FF007ACC"/>
                            </Trigger>
                        </ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                    </ControlTemplate>
                </Setter.Value>
            </Setter>
        </Style>

        <Style x:Key="AccentButton" TargetType="Button">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#FF7881FF"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="White"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="0"/>
            <Setter Property="Padding" Value="12,6"/>
            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="11"/>
            <Setter Property="Cursor" Value="Hand"/>
            <Setter Property="Template">
                <Setter.Value>
                    <ControlTemplate TargetType="Button">
                        <Border x:Name="border" Background="{TemplateBinding Background}" 
                                CornerRadius="4" Padding="{TemplateBinding Padding}">
                            <ContentPresenter HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                        </Border>
                        <ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                            <Trigger Property="IsMouseOver" Value="True">
                                <Setter TargetName="border" Property="Background" Value="#FFFFB74D"/>
                            </Trigger>
                            <Trigger Property="IsEnabled" Value="False">
                                <Setter Property="Opacity" Value="0.5"/>
                            </Trigger>
                        </ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                    </ControlTemplate>
                </Setter.Value>
            </Setter>
        </Style>

        <Style x:Key="TabButton" TargetType="Button">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="Transparent"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FF888888"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="0"/>
            <Setter Property="Padding" Value="10,5"/>
            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="10"/>
            <Setter Property="Cursor" Value="Hand"/>
            <Setter Property="Template">
                <Setter.Value>
                    <ControlTemplate TargetType="Button">
                        <Border x:Name="border" Background="{TemplateBinding Background}" 
                                CornerRadius="3" Padding="{TemplateBinding Padding}">
                            <ContentPresenter HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                        </Border>
                        <ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                            <Trigger Property="IsMouseOver" Value="True">
                                <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="White"/>
                            </Trigger>
                        </ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                    </ControlTemplate>
                </Setter.Value>
            </Setter>
        </Style>

        <Style x:Key="BrowserItem" TargetType="ListBoxItem">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="Transparent"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FFCCCCCC"/>
            <Setter Property="Padding" Value="8,4"/>
            <Setter Property="Cursor" Value="Hand"/>
            <Setter Property="Template">
                <Setter.Value>
                    <ControlTemplate TargetType="ListBoxItem">
                        <Border x:Name="border" Background="{TemplateBinding Background}" 
                                Padding="{TemplateBinding Padding}">
                            <ContentPresenter/>
                        </Border>
                        <ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                            <Trigger Property="IsMouseOver" Value="True">
                                <Setter TargetName="border" Property="Background" Value="#FF3E3E42"/>
                            </Trigger>
                            <Trigger Property="IsSelected" Value="True">
                                <Setter TargetName="border" Property="Background" Value="#FF007ACC"/>
                            </Trigger>
                        </ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                    </ControlTemplate>
                </Setter.Value>
            </Setter>
        </Style>

        <Style x:Key="WindowButton" TargetType="Button">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="Transparent"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FFAAAAAA"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="0"/>
            <Setter Property="Width" Value="46"/>
            <Setter Property="Height" Value="32"/>
            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="10"/>
            <Setter Property="Cursor" Value="Hand"/>
            <Setter Property="Template">
                <Setter.Value>
                    <ControlTemplate TargetType="Button">
                        <Border x:Name="border" Background="{TemplateBinding Background}">
                            <ContentPresenter HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                        </Border>
                        <ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                            <Trigger Property="IsMouseOver" Value="True">
                                <Setter TargetName="border" Property="Background" Value="#FF3E3E42"/>
                                <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="White"/>
                            </Trigger>
                        </ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                    </ControlTemplate>
                </Setter.Value>
            </Setter>
        </Style>

        <Style x:Key="CloseButton" TargetType="Button" BasedOn="{StaticResource WindowButton}">
            <Setter Property="Template">
                <Setter.Value>
                    <ControlTemplate TargetType="Button">
                        <Border x:Name="border" Background="{TemplateBinding Background}">
                            <ContentPresenter HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                        </Border>
                        <ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                            <Trigger Property="IsMouseOver" Value="True">
                                <Setter TargetName="border" Property="Background" Value="#E81123"/>
                                <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="White"/>
                            </Trigger>
                        </ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                    </ControlTemplate>
                </Setter.Value>
            </Setter>
        </Style>
        
        <BooleanToVisibilityConverter x:Key="BoolToVis"/>
        <local:InverseBoolToVisibilityConverter x:Key="InverseBoolToVis"/>
        
        <!-- Стиль TreeViewItem без проблемных биндингов -->
        <Style TargetType="TreeViewItem">
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="White"/>
            <Setter Property="HorizontalContentAlignment" Value="Stretch"/>
            <Setter Property="VerticalContentAlignment" Value="Center"/>
        </Style>
    </Window.Resources>

    <Window.Style>
        <Style TargetType="Window">
            <Setter Property="Template">
                <Setter.Value>
                    <ControlTemplate TargetType="Window">
                        <Grid Background="{TemplateBinding Background}">
                            <!-- Ресайз области -->
                            <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                                <RowDefinition Height="8"/>
                                <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                                <RowDefinition Height="8"/>
                            </Grid.RowDefinitions>
                            <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                                <ColumnDefinition Width="8"/>
                                <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                                <ColumnDefinition Width="8"/>
                            </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                            
                            <!-- Левый верхний угол -->
                            <Rectangle Grid.Row="0" Grid.Column="0" Fill="Transparent" Cursor="SizeNWSE" MouseLeftButtonDown="Resize_MouseLeftButtonDown" Tag="TopLeft"/>
                            <!-- Верх -->
                            <Rectangle Grid.Row="0" Grid.Column="1" Fill="Transparent" Cursor="SizeNS" MouseLeftButtonDown="Resize_MouseLeftButtonDown" Tag="Top"/>
                            <!-- Правый верхний угол -->
                            <Rectangle Grid.Row="0" Grid.Column="2" Fill="Transparent" Cursor="SizeNESW" MouseLeftButtonDown="Resize_MouseLeftButtonDown" Tag="TopRight"/>
                            <!-- Левый -->
                            <Rectangle Grid.Row="1" Grid.Column="0" Fill="Transparent" Cursor="SizeWE" MouseLeftButtonDown="Resize_MouseLeftButtonDown" Tag="Left"/>
                            <!-- Правый -->
                            <Rectangle Grid.Row="1" Grid.Column="2" Fill="Transparent" Cursor="SizeWE" MouseLeftButtonDown="Resize_MouseLeftButtonDown" Tag="Right"/>
                            <!-- Левый нижний угол -->
                            <Rectangle Grid.Row="2" Grid.Column="0" Fill="Transparent" Cursor="SizeNESW" MouseLeftButtonDown="Resize_MouseLeftButtonDown" Tag="BottomLeft"/>
                            <!-- Низ -->
                            <Rectangle Grid.Row="2" Grid.Column="1" Fill="Transparent" Cursor="SizeNS" MouseLeftButtonDown="Resize_MouseLeftButtonDown" Tag="Bottom"/>
                            <!-- Правый нижний угол -->
                            <Rectangle Grid.Row="2" Grid.Column="2" Fill="Transparent" Cursor="SizeNWSE" MouseLeftButtonDown="Resize_MouseLeftButtonDown" Tag="BottomRight"/>
                            
                            <!-- Основной контент с Margin для областей ресайза -->
                            <Border Grid.Row="1" Grid.Column="1" Background="{TemplateBinding Background}">
                                <ContentPresenter/>
                            </Border>
                        </Grid>
                    </ControlTemplate>
                </Setter.Value>
            </Setter>
        </Style>
    </Window.Style>

    <Grid>
        <Grid.RowDefinitions>
            <RowDefinition Height="32"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
        </Grid.RowDefinitions>

        <!-- Кастомный заголовок -->
        <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="#FF1A1A2E" MouseLeftButtonDown="TitleBar_MouseLeftButtonDown">
            <Grid>
                <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
                </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>

                <!-- Меню -->
                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="10,0">
                    <Button Content="File" Style="{StaticResource MenuButton}" Click="OpenFile_Click"/>
                    <Button Content="Hotkeys" Style="{StaticResource MenuButton}" Click="ShowHotkeys_Click"/>
                    <Button Content="Instruments" Style="{StaticResource MenuButton}" Click="ApplyEffects_Click"/>
                    <Button Content="Help" Style="{StaticResource MenuButton}"/>
                </StackPanel>

                <!-- Логотип (центр) -->
                <StackPanel Grid.Column="1" Orientation="Horizontal" HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="-100,0,0,0">
                    <TextBlock Text="halo" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="14" Foreground="#FF7881FF"/>
                    <TextBlock Text=" Blik" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="14" Foreground="White"/>
                </StackPanel>

                <!-- Кнопки управления окном -->
                <StackPanel Grid.Column="2" Orientation="Horizontal">
                    <Button Content="—" Style="{StaticResource WindowButton}" Click="Minimize_Click"/>
                    <Button x:Name="MaximizeBtn" Content="☐" Style="{StaticResource WindowButton}" Click="Maximize_Click"/>
                    <Button Content="✕" Style="{StaticResource CloseButton}" Click="Close_Click"/>
                </StackPanel>
            </Grid>
        </Border>

        <!-- Основная область -->
        <Grid Grid.Row="1">
            <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="220" MinWidth="150"/>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="5"/>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="*" MinWidth="200"/>
            </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>

            <!-- Левая панель - Браузер файлов -->
            <Border Grid.Column="0" Background="#FF252526" BorderBrush="#FF3E3E42" BorderThickness="0,0,1,0">
                <Grid>
                    <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                        <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                    </Grid.RowDefinitions>

                    <!-- Поле пути + Фильтры -->
                    <Grid Grid.Row="0">
                        <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                        </Grid.RowDefinitions>
                        
                        <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="#FF1E1E1E" Padding="8,6" BorderBrush="#FF3E3E42" BorderThickness="0,0,0,1">
                            <Grid>
                                <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                                    <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
                                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                                    <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
                                </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                                <TextBlock Text="📍" Foreground="#FF888888" FontSize="11" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,6,0"/>
                                <TextBox Grid.Column="1" x:Name="CurrentPathBox" Text="C:\\" 
                                         Background="#FF1E1E1E" Foreground="#FFCCCCCC" 
                                         BorderThickness="0" FontSize="11" VerticalContentAlignment="Center"
                                         IsReadOnly="True"/>
                                <Button Grid.Column="2" Content="📂" Style="{StaticResource ToolButton}" Width="28" Height="22" Click="BrowseRootFolder_Click" ToolTip="Выбрать папку"/>
                            </Grid>
                        </Border>
                        
                        <Border Grid.Row="1" Background="#FF2D2D30" Padding="8,4" BorderBrush="#FF3E3E42" BorderThickness="0,0,0,1">
                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                                <Button x:Name="BtnAll" Content="All" Style="{StaticResource TabButton}" Click="FilterAll_Click"/>
                                <Button x:Name="BtnDownloads" Content="Downloads" Style="{StaticResource TabButton}" Click="FilterDownloads_Click" Foreground="White"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Border>
                    </Grid>

                    <!-- Дерево папок и файлов -->
                    <Border Grid.Row="1" Background="#FF252526" BorderBrush="#FF3E3E42" BorderThickness="0">
                        <Grid>
                            <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                                <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                                <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                            </Grid.RowDefinitions>
                            <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="#FF2D2D30" Padding="8,4" BorderBrush="#FF3E3E42" BorderThickness="0,0,0,1">
                                <TextBlock Text="Files" Foreground="#FFFFFFFF" FontSize="10" FontWeight="SemiBold"/>
                            </Border>
                            <TreeView Grid.Row="1" x:Name="FolderTree" Background="#FF252526" Foreground="White" 
                                      BorderThickness="0" FontSize="11" Padding="4" Margin="0,4,0,0"
                                      HorizontalContentAlignment="Stretch" VerticalContentAlignment="Center"
                                      SelectedItemChanged="FolderTree_SelectedItemChanged">
                                <TreeView.ItemTemplate>
                                    <HierarchicalDataTemplate ItemsSource="{Binding Children}">
                                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding Icon}" Foreground="#FFAAAAAA" Margin="0,0,6,0"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding DisplayName}" Foreground="White"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding Duration}" Foreground="#FF888888" FontSize="9" Margin="8,0,0,0"
                                                       Visibility="{Binding IsDirectory, Converter={StaticResource InverseBoolToVis}}"/>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                    </HierarchicalDataTemplate>
                                </TreeView.ItemTemplate>
                            </TreeView>
                        </Grid>
                    </Border>
                </Grid>
            </Border>

            <!-- Разделитель -->
            <GridSplitter Grid.Column="1" Width="5" Background="#FF3E3E42"
                          HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Stretch"
                          Cursor="SizeWE" ShowsPreview="True"/>

            <!-- Основная рабочая область -->
            <Grid Grid.Column="2">
                <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                    <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                    <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                </Grid.RowDefinitions>

                <!-- Transport и инструменты -->
                <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="#FF323233" Padding="10,8">
                    <Grid>
                        <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                            <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
                            <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
                            <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                            <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
                        </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>

                        <!-- Transport -->
                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                            <Button x:Name="BtnPlay" Content="▶" Style="{StaticResource PlayButton}" Click="Play_Click" IsEnabled="False"/>
                            <Button x:Name="BtnStop" Content="■" Style="{StaticResource StopButton}" Click="Stop_Click" IsEnabled="False" Margin="5,0,0,0"/>
                        </StackPanel>

                        <!-- Инструменты -->
                        <StackPanel Grid.Column="1" Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="20,0">
                            <Button Content="✂" Style="{StaticResource ToolButton}" Click="Cut_Click" IsEnabled="False" x:Name="BtnCut" ToolTip="Вырезать"/>
                            <Button Content="📄" Style="{StaticResource ToolButton}" Click="Copy_Click" IsEnabled="False" x:Name="BtnCopy" ToolTip="Копировать"/>
                            <Button Content="📋" Style="{StaticResource ToolButton}" Click="Paste_Click" IsEnabled="False" x:Name="BtnPaste" ToolTip="Вставить"/>
                            <Button Content="🗑" Style="{StaticResource ToolButton}" Click="Delete_Click" IsEnabled="False" x:Name="BtnDelete" ToolTip="Удалить"/>
                            
                            <Rectangle Width="1" Fill="#FF555555" Margin="10,0"/>
                            
                            <Button Content="↶" Style="{StaticResource ToolButton}" Click="Undo_Click" x:Name="BtnUndo" ToolTip="Отменить"/>
                            <Button Content="↷" Style="{StaticResource ToolButton}" Click="Redo_Click" x:Name="BtnRedo" ToolTip="Вернуть"/>
                            
                            <Rectangle Width="1" Fill="#FF555555" Margin="10,0"/>
                            
                            <Button Content="🎧" Style="{StaticResource ToolButton}" ToolTip="Соло"/>
                            <Button Content="🔇" Style="{StaticResource ToolButton}" ToolTip="Мьют"/>
                        </StackPanel>

                        <!-- КнопкиApply -->
                        <StackPanel Grid.Column="3" Orientation="Horizontal">
                            <Button Content="+ Track" Style="{StaticResource AccentButton}" Click="AddTrack_Click" Margin="0,0,5,0"/>
                            <Button Content="- Delete" Style="{StaticResource MenuButton}" Click="RemoveTrack_Click"/>
                            <Button Content="✓ Apply" Style="{StaticResource AccentButton}" x:Name="BtnApply" Click="ApplyEffects_Click" IsEnabled="False" Margin="5,0,0,0"/>
                            <Button Content="G ↓" Style="{StaticResource MenuButton}" ToolTip="Группировать" Margin="5,0,0,0"/>
                        </StackPanel>
                    </Grid>
                </Border>

                <!-- Треки -->
                <Border Grid.Row="1" Background="#FF1E1E1E" AllowDrop="True" Drop="OnDrop" DragOver="OnDragOver">
                    <ScrollViewer x:Name="TracksScroller" VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto" HorizontalScrollBarVisibility="Visible"
                                  PanningMode="Both">
                        <Grid x:Name="TracksContainer">
                            <StackPanel x:Name="TracksPanel" HorizontalAlignment="Left"/>
                        </Grid>
                    </ScrollViewer>
                </Border>
            </Grid>
        </Grid>

        <!-- Нижняя панель - Статус -->
        <Border Grid.Row="2" Background="#FF323233" Padding="15,8" BorderBrush="#FF3E3E42" BorderThickness="0,1,0,0">
            <Grid>
                <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
                </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>

                <!-- Статус -->
                <TextBlock x:Name="StatusText" Text="Готов к работе" Foreground="#FF4CAF50" FontSize="11" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>

                <!-- Время -->
                <StackPanel Grid.Column="1" Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,0,20,0">
                    <TextBlock x:Name="CurrentTimeText" Text="00:00:00" Foreground="#FF7881FF" FontSize="14" FontFamily="Consolas" FontWeight="Bold"/>
                    <TextBlock Text=" / " Foreground="#FF666666" FontSize="14" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                    <TextBlock x:Name="TotalTimeText" Text="00:00:00" Foreground="#FF888888" FontSize="14" FontFamily="Consolas"/>
                </StackPanel>

                <!-- Масштаб -->
                <StackPanel Grid.Column="2" Orientation="Horizontal">
                    <Button Content="-" Style="{StaticResource ToolButton}" Click="ZoomOut_Click" Width="25" Height="22"/>
                    <Slider x:Name="ZoomSlider" Minimum="10" Maximum="500" Value="100" Width="100" ValueChanged="ZoomSlider_Changed" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                    <Button Content="+" Style="{StaticResource ToolButton}" Click="ZoomIn_Click" Width="25" Height="22"/>
                    <TextBlock x:Name="ZoomValue" Text="100%" Foreground="#FF888888" FontSize="10" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="8,0,0,0"/>
                </StackPanel>
            </Grid>
        </Border>
    </Grid>
</Window>","message":"Successfully read 494 lines from file: E:\Atest1.0\AudioStudio\AudioStudio\MainWindow.xaml"}

{"success":true,"file_path":"E:\Atest1.0\AudioStudio\AudioStudio\MainWindow.xaml","content":"<Window x:Class="AudioStudio.MainWindow"
        xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
        xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
        xmlns:local="clr-namespace:AudioStudio"
        Title="halo Blik - Audio Studio" 
        Height="800" Width="1400"
        MinHeight="600" MinWidth="1100"
        WindowStartupLocation="CenterScreen"
        WindowStyle="None"
        AllowsTransparency="True"
        Background="#FF2D2D30">

    <Window.Resources>
        <Style x:Key="MenuButton" TargetType="Button">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="Transparent"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FFAAAAAA"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="0"/>
            <Setter Property="Padding" Value="12,6"/>
            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="12"/>
            <Setter Property="Cursor" Value="Hand"/>
            <Setter Property="Template">
                <Setter.Value>
                    <ControlTemplate TargetType="Button">
                        <Border x:Name="border" Background="{TemplateBinding Background}" 
                                CornerRadius="3" Padding="{TemplateBinding Padding}">
                            <ContentPresenter HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                        </Border>
                        <ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                            <Trigger Property="IsMouseOver" Value="True">
                                <Setter TargetName="border" Property="Background" Value="#FF3E3E42"/>
                                <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="White"/>
                            </Trigger>
                        </ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                    </ControlTemplate>
                </Setter.Value>
            </Setter>
        </Style>

        <Style x:Key="TransportButton" TargetType="Button">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#FF3E3E42"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="White"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="0"/>
            <Setter Property="Width" Value="40"/>
            <Setter Property="Height" Value="32"/>
            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="14"/>
            <Setter Property="Cursor" Value="Hand"/>
            <Setter Property="Template">
                <Setter.Value>
                    <ControlTemplate TargetType="Button">
                        <Border x:Name="border" Background="{TemplateBinding Background}" 
                                CornerRadius="4" Padding="{TemplateBinding Padding}">
                            <ContentPresenter HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                        </Border>
                        <ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                            <Trigger Property="IsMouseOver" Value="True">
                                <Setter TargetName="border" Property="Background" Value="#FF505054"/>
                            </Trigger>
                            <Trigger Property="IsEnabled" Value="False">
                                <Setter Property="Opacity" Value="0.5"/>
                            </Trigger>
                        </ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                    </ControlTemplate>
                </Setter.Value>
            </Setter>
        </Style>

        <Style x:Key="PlayButton" TargetType="Button" BasedOn="{StaticResource TransportButton}">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#FF4CAF50"/>
            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="16"/>
        </Style>

        <Style x:Key="StopButton" TargetType="Button" BasedOn="{StaticResource TransportButton}">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#FFF44336"/>
        </Style>

        <Style x:Key="ToolButton" TargetType="Button">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#FF3E3E42"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FFAAAAAA"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="0"/>
            <Setter Property="Width" Value="32"/>
            <Setter Property="Height" Value="28"/>
            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="12"/>
            <Setter Property="Cursor" Value="Hand"/>
            <Setter Property="Template">
                <Setter.Value>
                    <ControlTemplate TargetType="Button">
                        <Border x:Name="border" Background="{TemplateBinding Background}" 
                                CornerRadius="3">
                            <ContentPresenter HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                        </Border>
                        <ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                            <Trigger Property="IsMouseOver" Value="True">
                                <Setter TargetName="border" Property="Background" Value="#FF505054"/>
                                <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="White"/>
                            </Trigger>
                            <Trigger Property="IsPressed" Value="True">
                                <Setter TargetName="border" Property="Background" Value="#FF007ACC"/>
                            </Trigger>
                        </ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                    </ControlTemplate>
                </Setter.Value>
            </Setter>
        </Style>

        <Style x:Key="AccentButton" TargetType="Button">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#FF7881FF"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="White"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="0"/>
            <Setter Property="Padding" Value="12,6"/>
            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="11"/>
            <Setter Property="Cursor" Value="Hand"/>
            <Setter Property="Template">
                <Setter.Value>
                    <ControlTemplate TargetType="Button">
                        <Border x:Name="border" Background="{TemplateBinding Background}" 
                                CornerRadius="4" Padding="{TemplateBinding Padding}">
                            <ContentPresenter HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                        </Border>
                        <ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                            <Trigger Property="IsMouseOver" Value="True">
                                <Setter TargetName="border" Property="Background" Value="#FFFFB74D"/>
                            </Trigger>
                            <Trigger Property="IsEnabled" Value="False">
                                <Setter Property="Opacity" Value="0.5"/>
                            </Trigger>
                        </ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                    </ControlTemplate>
                </Setter.Value>
            </Setter>
        </Style>

        <Style x:Key="TabButton" TargetType="Button">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="Transparent"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FF888888"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="0"/>
            <Setter Property="Padding" Value="10,5"/>
            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="10"/>
            <Setter Property="Cursor" Value="Hand"/>
            <Setter Property="Template">
                <Setter.Value>
                    <ControlTemplate TargetType="Button">
                        <Border x:Name="border" Background="{TemplateBinding Background}" 
                                CornerRadius="3" Padding="{TemplateBinding Padding}">
                            <ContentPresenter HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                        </Border>
                        <ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                            <Trigger Property="IsMouseOver" Value="True">
                                <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="White"/>
                            </Trigger>
                        </ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                    </ControlTemplate>
                </Setter.Value>
            </Setter>
        </Style>

        <Style x:Key="BrowserItem" TargetType="ListBoxItem">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="Transparent"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FFCCCCCC"/>
            <Setter Property="Padding" Value="8,4"/>
            <Setter Property="Cursor" Value="Hand"/>
            <Setter Property="Template">
                <Setter.Value>
                    <ControlTemplate TargetType="ListBoxItem">
                        <Border x:Name="border" Background="{TemplateBinding Background}" 
                                Padding="{TemplateBinding Padding}">
                            <ContentPresenter/>
                        </Border>
                        <ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                            <Trigger Property="IsMouseOver" Value="True">
                                <Setter TargetName="border" Property="Background" Value="#FF3E3E42"/>
                            </Trigger>
                            <Trigger Property="IsSelected" Value="True">
                                <Setter TargetName="border" Property="Background" Value="#FF007ACC"/>
                            </Trigger>
                        </ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                    </ControlTemplate>
                </Setter.Value>
            </Setter>
        </Style>

        <Style x:Key="WindowButton" TargetType="Button">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="Transparent"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FFAAAAAA"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="0"/>
            <Setter Property="Width" Value="46"/>
            <Setter Property="Height" Value="32"/>
            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="10"/>
            <Setter Property="Cursor" Value="Hand"/>
            <Setter Property="Template">
                <Setter.Value>
                    <ControlTemplate TargetType="Button">
                        <Border x:Name="border" Background="{TemplateBinding Background}">
                            <ContentPresenter HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                        </Border>
                        <ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                            <Trigger Property="IsMouseOver" Value="True">
                                <Setter TargetName="border" Property="Background" Value="#FF3E3E42"/>
                                <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="White"/>
                            </Trigger>
                        </ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                    </ControlTemplate>
                </Setter.Value>
            </Setter>
        </Style>

        <Style x:Key="CloseButton" TargetType="Button" BasedOn="{StaticResource WindowButton}">
            <Setter Property="Template">
                <Setter.Value>
                    <ControlTemplate TargetType="Button">
                        <Border x:Name="border" Background="{TemplateBinding Background}">
                            <ContentPresenter HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                        </Border>
                        <ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                            <Trigger Property="IsMouseOver" Value="True">
                                <Setter TargetName="border" Property="Background" Value="#E81123"/>
                                <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="White"/>
                            </Trigger>
                        </ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                    </ControlTemplate>
                </Setter.Value>
            </Setter>
        </Style>
        
        <BooleanToVisibilityConverter x:Key="BoolToVis"/>
        <local:InverseBoolToVisibilityConverter x:Key="InverseBoolToVis"/>
        
        <!-- Стиль TreeViewItem без проблемных биндингов -->
        <Style TargetType="TreeViewItem">
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="White"/>
            <Setter Property="HorizontalContentAlignment" Value="Stretch"/>
            <Setter Property="VerticalContentAlignment" Value="Center"/>
        </Style>
    </Window.Resources>

    <Window.Style>
        <Style TargetType="Window">
            <Setter Property="Template">
                <Setter.Value>
                    <ControlTemplate TargetType="Window">
                        <Grid Background="{TemplateBinding Background}">
                            <!-- Ресайз области -->
                            <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                                <RowDefinition Height="8"/>
                                <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                                <RowDefinition Height="8"/>
                            </Grid.RowDefinitions>
                            <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                                <ColumnDefinition Width="8"/>
                                <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                                <ColumnDefinition Width="8"/>
                            </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                            
                            <!-- Левый верхний угол -->
                            <Rectangle Grid.Row="0" Grid.Column="0" Fill="Transparent" Cursor="SizeNWSE" MouseLeftButtonDown="Resize_MouseLeftButtonDown" Tag="TopLeft"/>
                            <!-- Верх -->
                            <Rectangle Grid.Row="0" Grid.Column="1" Fill="Transparent" Cursor="SizeNS" MouseLeftButtonDown="Resize_MouseLeftButtonDown" Tag="Top"/>
                            <!-- Правый верхний угол -->
                            <Rectangle Grid.Row="0" Grid.Column="2" Fill="Transparent" Cursor="SizeNESW" MouseLeftButtonDown="Resize_MouseLeftButtonDown" Tag="TopRight"/>
                            <!-- Левый -->
                            <Rectangle Grid.Row="1" Grid.Column="0" Fill="Transparent" Cursor="SizeWE" MouseLeftButtonDown="Resize_MouseLeftButtonDown" Tag="Left"/>
                            <!-- Правый -->
                            <Rectangle Grid.Row="1" Grid.Column="2" Fill="Transparent" Cursor="SizeWE" MouseLeftButtonDown="Resize_MouseLeftButtonDown" Tag="Right"/>
                            <!-- Левый нижний угол -->
                            <Rectangle Grid.Row="2" Grid.Column="0" Fill="Transparent" Cursor="SizeNESW" MouseLeftButtonDown="Resize_MouseLeftButtonDown" Tag="BottomLeft"/>
                            <!-- Низ -->
                            <Rectangle Grid.Row="2" Grid.Column="1" Fill="Transparent" Cursor="SizeNS" MouseLeftButtonDown="Resize_MouseLeftButtonDown" Tag="Bottom"/>
                            <!-- Правый нижний угол -->
                            <Rectangle Grid.Row="2" Grid.Column="2" Fill="Transparent" Cursor="SizeNWSE" MouseLeftButtonDown="Resize_MouseLeftButtonDown" Tag="BottomRight"/>
                            
                            <!-- Основной контент с Margin для областей ресайза -->
                            <Border Grid.Row="1" Grid.Column="1" Background="{TemplateBinding Background}">
                                <ContentPresenter/>
                            </Border>
                        </Grid>
                    </ControlTemplate>
                </Setter.Value>
            </Setter>
        </Style>
    </Window.Style>

    <Grid>
        <Grid.RowDefinitions>
            <RowDefinition Height="32"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
        </Grid.RowDefinitions>

        <!-- Кастомный заголовок -->
        <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="#FF1A1A2E" MouseLeftButtonDown="TitleBar_MouseLeftButtonDown">
            <Grid>
                <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
                </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>

                <!-- Меню -->
                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="10,0">
                    <Button Content="File" Style="{StaticResource MenuButton}" Click="OpenFile_Click"/>
                    <Button Content="Hotkeys" Style="{StaticResource MenuButton}" Click="ShowHotkeys_Click"/>
                    <Button Content="Instruments" Style="{StaticResource MenuButton}" Click="ApplyEffects_Click"/>
                    <Button Content="Help" Style="{StaticResource MenuButton}"/>
                </StackPanel>

                <!-- Логотип (центр) -->
                <StackPanel Grid.Column="1" Orientation="Horizontal" HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="-100,0,0,0">
                    <TextBlock Text="halo" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="14" Foreground="#FF7881FF"/>
                    <TextBlock Text=" Blik" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="14" Foreground="White"/>
                </StackPanel>

                <!-- Кнопки управления окном -->
                <StackPanel Grid.Column="2" Orientation="Horizontal">
                    <Button Content="—" Style="{StaticResource WindowButton}" Click="Minimize_Click"/>
                    <Button x:Name="MaximizeBtn" Content="☐" Style="{StaticResource WindowButton}" Click="Maximize_Click"/>
                    <Button Content="✕" Style="{StaticResource CloseButton}" Click="Close_Click"/>
                </StackPanel>
            </Grid>
        </Border>

        <!-- Основная область -->
        <Grid Grid.Row="1">
            <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="220" MinWidth="150"/>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="5"/>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="*" MinWidth="200"/>
            </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>

            <!-- Левая панель - Браузер файлов -->
            <Border Grid.Column="0" Background="#FF252526" BorderBrush="#FF3E3E42" BorderThickness="0,0,1,0">
                <Grid>
                    <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                        <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                    </Grid.RowDefinitions>

                    <!-- Поле пути + Фильтры -->
                    <Grid Grid.Row="0">
                        <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                        </Grid.RowDefinitions>
                        
                        <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="#FF1E1E1E" Padding="8,6" BorderBrush="#FF3E3E42" BorderThickness="0,0,0,1">
                            <Grid>
                                <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                                    <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
                                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                                    <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
                                </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                                <TextBlock Text="📍" Foreground="#FF888888" FontSize="11" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,6,0"/>
                                <TextBox Grid.Column="1" x:Name="CurrentPathBox" Text="C:\\" 
                                         Background="#FF1E1E1E" Foreground="#FFCCCCCC" 
                                         BorderThickness="0" FontSize="11" VerticalContentAlignment="Center"
                                         IsReadOnly="True"/>
                                <Button Grid.Column="2" Content="📂" Style="{StaticResource ToolButton}" Width="28" Height="22" Click="BrowseRootFolder_Click" ToolTip="Выбрать папку"/>
                            </Grid>
                        </Border>
                        
                        <Border Grid.Row="1" Background="#FF2D2D30" Padding="8,4" BorderBrush="#FF3E3E42" BorderThickness="0,0,0,1">
                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                                <Button x:Name="BtnAll" Content="All" Style="{StaticResource TabButton}" Click="FilterAll_Click"/>
                                <Button x:Name="BtnDownloads" Content="Downloads" Style="{StaticResource TabButton}" Click="FilterDownloads_Click" Foreground="White"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Border>
                    </Grid>

                    <!-- Дерево папок и файлов -->
                    <Border Grid.Row="1" Background="#FF252526" BorderBrush="#FF3E3E42" BorderThickness="0">
                        <Grid>
                            <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                                <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                                <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                            </Grid.RowDefinitions>
                            <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="#FF2D2D30" Padding="8,4" BorderBrush="#FF3E3E42" BorderThickness="0,0,0,1">
                                <TextBlock Text="Files" Foreground="#FFFFFFFF" FontSize="10" FontWeight="SemiBold"/>
                            </Border>
                            <TreeView Grid.Row="1" x:Name="FolderTree" Background="#FF252526" Foreground="White" 
                                      BorderThickness="0" FontSize="11" Padding="4" Margin="0,4,0,0"
                                      HorizontalContentAlignment="Stretch" VerticalContentAlignment="Center"
                                      SelectedItemChanged="FolderTree_SelectedItemChanged">
                                <TreeView.ItemTemplate>
                                    <HierarchicalDataTemplate ItemsSource="{Binding Children}">
                                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding Icon}" Foreground="#FFAAAAAA" Margin="0,0,6,0"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding DisplayName}" Foreground="White"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding Duration}" Foreground="#FF888888" FontSize="9" Margin="8,0,0,0"
                                                       Visibility="{Binding IsDirectory, Converter={StaticResource InverseBoolToVis}}"/>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                    </HierarchicalDataTemplate>
                                </TreeView.ItemTemplate>
                            </TreeView>
                        </Grid>
                    </Border>
                </Grid>
            </Border>

            <!-- Разделитель -->
            <GridSplitter Grid.Column="1" Width="5" Background="Transparent"
                          HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Stretch"
                          Cursor="SizeWE" ShowsPreview="True"/>

            <!-- Основная рабочая область -->
            <Grid Grid.Column="2">
                <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                    <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                    <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                </Grid.RowDefinitions>

                <!-- Transport и инструменты -->
                <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="#FF323233" Padding="10,8">
                    <Grid>
                        <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                            <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
                            <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
                            <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                            <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
                        </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>

                        <!-- Transport -->
                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                            <Button x:Name="BtnPlay" Content="▶" Style="{StaticResource PlayButton}" Click="Play_Click" IsEnabled="False"/>
                            <Button x:Name="BtnStop" Content="■" Style="{StaticResource StopButton}" Click="Stop_Click" IsEnabled="False" Margin="5,0,0,0"/>
                        </StackPanel>

                        <!-- Инструменты -->
                        <StackPanel Grid.Column="1" Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="20,0">
                            <Button Content="✂" Style="{StaticResource ToolButton}" Click="Cut_Click" IsEnabled="False" x:Name="BtnCut" ToolTip="Вырезать"/>
                            <Button Content="📄" Style="{StaticResource ToolButton}" Click="Copy_Click" IsEnabled="False" x:Name="BtnCopy" ToolTip="Копировать"/>
                            <Button Content="📋" Style="{StaticResource ToolButton}" Click="Paste_Click" IsEnabled="False" x:Name="BtnPaste" ToolTip="Вставить"/>
                            <Button Content="🗑" Style="{StaticResource ToolButton}" Click="Delete_Click" IsEnabled="False" x:Name="BtnDelete" ToolTip="Удалить"/>
                            
                            <Rectangle Width="1" Fill="#FF555555" Margin="10,0"/>
                            
                            <Button Content="↶" Style="{StaticResource ToolButton}" Click="Undo_Click" x:Name="BtnUndo" ToolTip="Отменить"/>
                            <Button Content="↷" Style="{StaticResource ToolButton}" Click="Redo_Click" x:Name="BtnRedo" ToolTip="Вернуть"/>
                            
                            <Rectangle Width="1" Fill="#FF555555" Margin="10,0"/>
                            
                            <Button Content="🎧" Style="{StaticResource ToolButton}" ToolTip="Соло"/>
                            <Button Content="🔇" Style="{StaticResource ToolButton}" ToolTip="Мьют"/>
                        </StackPanel>

                        <!-- КнопкиApply -->
                        <StackPanel Grid.Column="3" Orientation="Horizontal">
                            <Button Content="+ Track" Style="{StaticResource AccentButton}" Click="AddTrack_Click" Margin="0,0,5,0"/>
                            <Button Content="- Delete" Style="{StaticResource MenuButton}" Click="RemoveTrack_Click"/>
                            <Button Content="✓ Apply" Style="{StaticResource AccentButton}" x:Name="BtnApply" Click="ApplyEffects_Click" IsEnabled="False" Margin="5,0,0,0"/>
                            <Button Content="G ↓" Style="{StaticResource MenuButton}" ToolTip="Группировать" Margin="5,0,0,0"/>
                        </StackPanel>
                    </Grid>
                </Border>

                <!-- Треки -->
                <Border Grid.Row="1" Background="#FF1E1E1E" AllowDrop="True" Drop="OnDrop" DragOver="OnDragOver">
                    <ScrollViewer x:Name="TracksScroller" VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto" HorizontalScrollBarVisibility="Visible"
                                  PanningMode="Both">
                        <Grid x:Name="TracksContainer">
                            <StackPanel x:Name="TracksPanel" HorizontalAlignment="Left"/>
                        </Grid>
                    </ScrollViewer>
                </Border>
            </Grid>
        </Grid>

        <!-- Нижняя панель - Статус -->
        <Border Grid.Row="2" Background="#FF323233" Padding="15,8" BorderBrush="#FF3E3E42" BorderThickness="0,1,0,0">
            <Grid>
                <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
                </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>

                <!-- Статус -->
                <TextBlock x:Name="StatusText" Text="Готов к работе" Foreground="#FF4CAF50" FontSize="11" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>

                <!-- Время -->
                <StackPanel Grid.Column="1" Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,0,20,0">
                    <TextBlock x:Name="CurrentTimeText" Text="00:00:00" Foreground="#FF7881FF" FontSize="14" FontFamily="Consolas" FontWeight="Bold"/>
                    <TextBlock Text=" / " Foreground="#FF666666" FontSize="14" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                    <TextBlock x:Name="TotalTimeText" Text="00:00:00" Foreground="#FF888888" FontSize="14" FontFamily="Consolas"/>
                </StackPanel>

                <!-- Масштаб -->
                <StackPanel Grid.Column="2" Orientation="Horizontal">
                    <Button Content="-" Style="{StaticResource ToolButton}" Click="ZoomOut_Click" Width="25" Height="22"/>
                    <Slider x:Name="ZoomSlider" Minimum="10" Maximum="500" Value="100" Width="100" ValueChanged="ZoomSlider_Changed" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                    <Button Content="+" Style="{StaticResource ToolButton}" Click="ZoomIn_Click" Width="25" Height="22"/>
                    <TextBlock x:Name="ZoomValue" Text="100%" Foreground="#FF888888" FontSize="10" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="8,0,0,0"/>
                </StackPanel>
            </Grid>
        </Border>
    </Grid>
</Window>","message":"Successfully read first 494 lines from file: E:\Atest1.0\AudioStudio\AudioStudio\MainWindow.xaml"}

<!-- Полный стиль TreeViewItem без проблемных биндингов -->
        <Style TargetType="TreeViewItem">
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="White"/>
            <Setter Property="HorizontalContentAlignment" Value="Left"/>
            <Setter Property="VerticalContentAlignment" Value="Center"/>
            <Setter Property="Padding" Value="2"/>
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="Transparent"/>
        </Style>
        
        <!-- Невидимый GridSplitter -->
        <Style x:Key="InvisibleSplitter" TargetType="GridSplitter">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="Transparent"/>
            <Setter Property="Width" Value="6"/>
            <Setter Property="Template" Value="{x:Null}"/>
        </Style>
    </Window.Resources>

**Готово!** ✅

Исправлено:
1. **TreeViewItem** - убран проблемный binding `HorizontalContentAlignment` на `Stretch` (теперь `Left` - значения по умолчанию нет конфликтов)
2. **GridSplitter** - теперь 6px ширина, полностью прозрачный, без стилей

Теперь:
- Полоса между панелями невидимая, но при наведении курсор ↔ покажет что можно тянуть
- Ошибки binding в Output больше не должны появляться

Тестируй! 🎵
то что ты увеличил возьми и верни к прежним настройкам но сделай область действия просто

**Готово!** ✅

Исправлено:
1. **NullReferenceException** - теперь mouse events привязаны к конкретному элементу, а не к Window
2. **Внешняя рамка** - области ресайза уменьшены с 8px до 4px
3. **Разделитель** - GridSplitter уменьшен с 5px до 2px, полностью прозрачный

Теперь:
- Внешние области ресайза = 4px (невидимые)
- Внутренний разделитель = 2px (невидимый, но курсор показывает)
- Ошибка NullReference исправлена
